check.action: Halt with: "thoughts CLI not found on PATH. Codesmith requires thoughts CLI. Install thoughts-cli or ensure it's on PATH for this session."
Halt with: "worktrunk (wt) CLI not found on PATH. Codesmith requires worktrunk for Work-Tree management. Install via `brew install worktrunk` + `wt config shell install`."

substep.title: Confirm Team Config Has Required Kinds
substep.action:
Extract the team name. Read the team config: ~/thoughts/teams/{{team}}/config.json
Verify workflow.kinds includes: design, structure, plan, verification, research.
If any kind is missing, halt with: "Team config is missing required kind(s): {{missing}}. Codesmith authoring requires these kinds. Add them to ~/thoughts/teams/{{team}}/config.json in workflow.kinds, workflow.backlog.kinds, and workflow.archive.kinds. Then run `thoughts sync`."

check.action:
Halt with: "Working tree has uncommitted changes. Codesmith enters Work-Tree phase later and requires a clean baseline. Commit, stash, or discard before invoking codesmith.
Output:\n{{git_status_output}}"
